headlines.description: — Josh Allen will never forget the emotional support Bills offensive coordinator Brian Daboll provided the quarterback following the loss of his grandmother 13 months ago.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen honors OC Daboll in Bills' 43-21 rout of Washington

headlines.description: — Justin Fields had nowhere to run or hide. Passing was strictly prohibited.
headlines.shortLinkText: Garrett, Browns rough up rookie QB Fields, slam Bears 26-6

headlines.description: — Justin Tucker ended the game as if he was starting it, backing up an extra step or two and kicking the football with every bit of force he had in his right foot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tucker's NFL-record FG lifts Ravens to 19-17 win over Lions

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans know it's almost impossible to win a game turning the ball over three times.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ryan Tannehill throws 3 TDs as Titans hold off Colts 25-16

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Chargers had just turned the Kansas City Chiefs over for the fourth time Sunday. Los Angeles coach Brandon Staley was left with a crucial fourth-down call with less than a minute left in a tie game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chargers rally to beat turnover-prone Chiefs 30-24 in KC

events.name: New Orleans Saints at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Only one brand of football comes to mind when Jameis Winston thinks about the best New Orleans Saints teams of the past.
headlines.shortLinkText: Winston has 2 TDs, Saints pick Jones 3 times in 28-13 win

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New York Giants

headlines.description: — After three games and a lot of ugly football, Arthur Smith finally picked up his first win as an NFL coach and his first game ball, courtesy of Matt Ryan.
headlines.shortLinkText: Falcons give Smith first win, beat Giants on Eli's day

headlines.description: — It's not enough to talk about changing the culture, something Zac Taylor started doing the moment he took over as Cincinnati Bengals head coach more than two years ago.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow throws 3 TDs, Bengals drop listless Steelers 24-10

headlines.description: — Byron Murphy caught a glimpse of J.J. Watt bearing down on Trevor Lawrence and figured the pass would be underthrown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cards use Pick-6 to overcome Kick-6, beat Jaguars 31-19

events.name: New York Jets at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Vic Fangio has a rejoinder ready for anyone downplaying Denver’s first 3-0 start in five years just because the Broncos' opponents are a combined 0-9.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos throttle Jets 26-0 for first 3-0 start since 2016

events.name: Miami Dolphins at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — The Las Vegas Raiders are off to their best start since 2002.
headlines.shortLinkText: Carlson's field goal gives Raiders 31-28 OT win over Miami

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Sean McVay's excitement over the big-play potential the Los Angeles Rams have with Matthew Stafford finally got the best of him Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams' Stafford throws for 4 TDs, outduels Brady and Bucs

headlines.description: — After two narrow losses to start the season, Kirk Cousins and the Minnesota Vikings found a foolproof way to avoid the type of harrowing finish that has haunted them more often than not.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins, Vikings cruise 30-17, end skid vs. Seahawks

events.name: Green Bay Packers at San Francisco 49ers

headlines.description: — With only seconds to play and no timeouts, Aaron Rodgers had no doubt where he'd look to drive the Green Bay Packers to a game-winning kick.
